revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:茶臼塚古墳 (八女市)]]
{{Infobox ancient site|type = {{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}| name=Chausuzuka Kofun| image ={{image needed|cat=Yame City|qq=}}| Part of={{ill|Yame Kofun Cluster|en|Yame Kofun Cluster|qid=Q64615207|lt=Yame Kofun Cluster|1=Yame Kofun Cluster}}| location=Takumada, Yame City, Fukuoka Prefecture| coordinates={{coord|33|14|03.7|N|130|34|14.0|E|display=inline|qq=}}| type=Round tumulus| area=Diameter 24m| burial=(Presumed) Corridor-style stone chamber| built=Late 6th century| burial goods=Haniwa, Sue pottery| Historic Site Historic Site=[[Shōwa]] 53 (1978), [[:en:Historic Sites of Japan|National Historic Site]]| }} '''Chausuzuka Kofun''' (茶臼塚古墳) is a [[Round Kofun|Round tumulus]] located in [[Yame City]], {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|en|Fukuoka Prefecture|qid=Q123258|lt=Fukuoka Prefecture|1=Fukuoka Prefecture}}. It has been Historic Site1 as a [[:en:Historic Sites of Japan|National Historic Site]] and is one of the Kofuns that make up the {{ill|Yame Kofun Cluster|en|Yame Kofun Cluster|qid=Q64615207|lt=Yame Kofun Cluster|1=Yame Kofun Cluster}}. The tumulus measures 24 meters in diameter and 5.3 meters in height. Based on the surrounding features, it is possible that a moat and embankment existed, though this is not confirmed<ref name=iwato>"Iwato Historical Museum Exhibition Catalogue," p. 27</ref>. The site has been heavily looted, resulting in the collapse of the central mound. While the burial structure is unknown, it is presumed to have been a [[corridor-style stone chamber]]<ref name=iwato>"Iwato Historical Museum Exhibition Catalogue," p. 27</ref>. No excavation has been conducted, but burial goods such as {{ill|Sue pottery|en|Sue pottery|qid=Q7634351|lt=Sue pottery|1=Sue pottery}} and [[cylindrical haniwa]] recovered in the past suggest the tumulus was constructed in the late {{ill|6th century|en|6th century|qid=Q8090|lt=6th century|1=6th century}}<ref>[http://www.city.yame.fukuoka.jp/aboutyame/bunka/k_i_008.html Chausuzuka Kofun - Yame City]</ref><ref name=iwato>"Iwato Historical Museum Exhibition Catalogue," p. 27</ref>. == notes == <references /> == Related articles == * {{ill|List of kofun in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧#福岡県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Japan|1=list of kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11505809}} * {{ill|List of historic sites in Kyushu and Okinawa|ja|九州・沖縄地方の史跡一覧#福岡県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of historic sites in Kyushu and Okinawa|1=list of historic sites in Kyushu and Okinawa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11370155}}
{{Kofun navbar|qq=}}
{{translated page|ja|茶臼塚古墳 (八女市)|version=91172793|comment=Imported full ja history}}
